# KQED: Bi-Weekly Metrics Review

**Date**: 2026-03-18  
**Source**: Auto-generated meeting notes (shared via email)

## Summary

Acquisition and install metrics declined due to a technical error (since resolved). Conversion data reflected pre-pledge activity. Product development moved forward with new functionality.

## Acquisition metrics (affected by error)

- **Installs** decreased significantly because KQED AB test slide-ins **lacked links** — a technical error that has been **resolved**; traffic expected to improve soon.
- New slide-ins are already showing **better click-through** than the older versions.

## Product and promotion updates

- **Custom product pages** — work ongoing.
- **Radio live search** on Google — being prepared for testing.
- **Newsletter promotion** — launch scheduled for after the current pledge drive ends.

## Retention and external factors

- **Week 1 retention** improved.
- **Reactivation campaign** — zero data recorded; may not be running. Julia to end and restart.
- Need to **track external factors** (news alerts, radio promotions) to fully understand retention and engagement swings.

## Next steps (see actions file)
